title: Andesite Mining
description: Pack made for andesite mining on RPDND POTP
body:
This pack is made to more easily tell apart the andesite when mining in the caves on the RPDND server. This ensures u dont break the wrong blocks by having a border and being emissive aswell as having a color change on the actual andesite rock part.

## for the full experience get continuity, another ctm mod or OF
